claims.statement: CL2  classical: closed; 15/15 laws enumerated [LNC:Y LEM:Y DN:Y MP:Y]; declared signature matches
K3   strong Kleene: closed; 14/15 laws enumerated [LNC:Y LEM:. DN:Y MP:Y]; declared signature matches
LP   priest: closed; 12/15 laws enumerated [LNC:. LEM:Y DN:Y MP:.]; declared signature matches
L3   lukasiewicz: closed; 11/15 laws enumerated [LNC:Y LEM:Y DN:Y MP:Y]; declared signature matches
G3   goedel: closed; 13/15 laws enumerated [LNC:Y LEM:. DN:. MP:Y]; declared signature matches
B3   weak Kleene: closed; 13/15 laws enumerated [LNC:Y LEM:. DN:Y MP:Y]; declared signature matches
FDE  four-valued: closed; 11/15 laws enumerated [LNC:. LEM:. DN:Y MP:.]; declared signature matches
Catalogue headline reproduced: K3 and L3 share V={0,1/2,1} yet LEM fails in one and is forced in the other — the law is a property of G on V, not a fact to look up
FUZZY [0,1] (min/max/1-x): De Morgan, distributivity, absorption hold on 2000 random triples; LEM fails at the exhibited point a=0.5 (max(0.5,0.5)=0.5, undesignated)

PROBABILITY (AND=ab under stipulated independence, OR=a+b-ab): De Morgan holds on 2000 samples; distributivity FAILS by single counterexample a=b=c=1/2: 0.3750 != 0.4375 — disproof by exhibition, the corpus method
The probability AND=ab is the independence stipulation; dependence needs the joint-distribution carrier. Recorded, not hidden
CALCULUS (dual numbers): Leibniz propagation matches central-difference derivative on 500 random points. eps is SIGNED gradient; load is non-negative cost — related, not identical
The eps<->load correspondence (Leibniz ~ AND load rule) is structural analogy up to |.|, priced as such
Calibration: b_eff = 0.66986 fixed so that 1/alpha runs 137.036 -> 128.936 between m_e and M_Z (one-loop effective; not a prediction, an anchor)
GROUP LAW: 1000 random multi-step paths — staged and direct propagation agree in VALUE to 1e-12 relative. The gradient composes; the scale map is a state function

PATH DEPENDENCE OF LOAD: on 1000 wandering paths the accumulated load never undercuts the direct path (triangle inequality on |b dlog|). Value forgets the route; the bill does not. State function vs process function, shipped as code
alpha(M_Z) = 1/128.936 with L = 8.1000 paid in one step; theta-live check: pattern coheres in Context(theta=1) = False

SELF-DESCRIPTION: the kernel's load arithmetic (AND=+, OR=min on [0,inf)) is the tropical semiring — the accounting layer is itself a registered carrier. Given the stipulated load rules, the correspondence is exact
THETA IS LIVE: chaining AND(load 2.0) under theta=25 decoheres at op 12 (L = 26 > 25), exactly where the load arithmetic forces it — thresholds enforce, not decorate
Joule floor of this run's 20,780 distinctions IF erased irreversibly at T=300 K (stated, not hidden): 5.97e-17 J
REIFICATION IS PRICED: alpha(M_Z).reify() returns the bare float 0.007756 and appends the erasure to the ledger; L rises 8.100 -> 9.100. You may drop the scope. You may not drop it for free
THE 0.5 TEST (diagnostic heuristic): 'the system is safe' -> REIFICATION - continuous domain, binary carrier; 'the toggle is off' -> binary may fit - check boundaries
NOT claimed: that the registry exhausts formal systems. Substructural proof theory, non-matrix semantics, and conditionals beyond material enter through the same gate when built
NOT claimed: that load equals physical energy without an implementation map. landauer(bits,T) is a floor for irreversible erasure, quoted only with T explicit
NOT claimed: that the tier order is forced. It is the kernel's constitution — a stipulation the kernel cannot outrank
Chain of 5 generations replays intact; a mutated seal breaks replay at its link. The kernel's history is a verifiable structure, not a log
